title: ilex dahoon var. angustifolia
intro: Ilex dahoon var. angustifolia is a variant of the Dahoon Holly plant, a type of evergreen shrub native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ilex dahoon var. angustifolia are said to include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from colds and respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
